case_title: SALVANA, ESTELA O. et al VS FIGUEROA, CERVATOS V.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-19-1994, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT FIGUEROA, CERVATOS V.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALVANA, ESTELA O. SALVANA, TEODORO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIGUEROA, CERVATOS V. $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
